case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. T.T.K. CONSTRUCTION INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 100077077) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100072187) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE 1717.5 (TRANSACTION ID # 100072187) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100077077) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT T.T.K. CONSTRUCTION INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT T.T.K. CONSTRUCTION INC. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-10-2019

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100065868), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED FEB-20-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-20-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT T.T.K. CONSTRUCTION INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100069098) AS TO DEFENDANT T.T.K. CONSTRUCTION INC.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $483.85 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100072187) AS TO DEFENDANT T.T.K. CONSTRUCTION INC.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100072187) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DECLARATION FOR ACCRUED INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 100072187) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT T.T.K. CONSTRUCTION INC. $11,032.71 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $996.60 INTEREST, $483.85 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,713.16, SEE SCANNED DOC
